summary: Completed testing of new Insights page with charts, restored Sales nav item (4 sidebar items total), and insights-trends API. All backend tests pass (13/13). All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing documents from previous test iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Insights page fully tested with recharts integration. Sidebar now has 4 items (Inbox, Sales, Insights, Settings). InsightsPage displays 4 summary cards (Total Ingested, Avg Auto Rate, Avg AI Confidence, Vendor Resolve) and 2 charts (Daily Ingestion Volume bar chart, Automation & AI Learning Trends area chart). Period selector (7d, 14d, 30d) works correctly. Sales page has 6 tabs (Pipeline Demo, My Queue, Triage, Sales Orders, Rep Performance, Inventory Ledger). Document row click navigates to detail page correctly.

backend: insights-trends returns daily array, bakeoff_runs, period_days - PASS

insights-trends daily values are numeric - PASS
insights-trends rates are valid percentages (0-100) - PASS
insights-trends period selector days=7 works - PASS
insights-trends period selector days=14 works - PASS
insights-trends period selector days=30 works - PASS
inbox-stats returns all 7 required fields - PASS

GET /api/documents returns 200 with documents list - PASS
